narrative:
14 Ohio House district has 77,473 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.8% D−R vs +15.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
